fact_recall.name: Fact Recall Score
fact_recall.description: Whether all input facts appear in the output.

tone_alignment.name: Tone Alignment Score
tone_alignment.description: Whether the email matches the requested tone.

model_a_results.intent: Follow up after a networking event
key_facts: Discussed potential collaboration on AI project
Available for coffee chat next week
model_a_results.generated_subject: Follow‑up from Tech Conference 2026 – AI Collaboration Discussion
model_a_results.generated_body:
Dear [Recipient’s Name],

It was a pleasure meeting you at Tech Conference 2026 and learning more about your work in artificial intelligence. I enjoyed our conversation about a potential collaboration on the AI project you outlined, and I’m enthusiastic about exploring how our teams might combine expertise to accelerate development.

If you’re available, I would welcome the opportunity to continue our discussion over coffee next week. I’m free on Tuesday (June 25) or Thursday (June 27) between 10:00 AM and 2:00 PM, but I’m happy to accommodate a time that works best for you.

Please let me know which slot fits your schedule, or suggest an alternative, and I’ll arrange the details.

Looking forward to the possibility of working together.

Best regards,
[Your Full Name]
[Your Title]
[Your Company]
[Phone Number]
[Email Address]
model_a_results.reference_subject: Great Meeting You at Tech Conference 2026
model_a_results.reference_body:
Dear Alex,

It was a pleasure meeting you at Tech Conference 2026 last week. I truly enjoyed our conversation about the potential collaboration on the AI project we discussed.

I believe there is strong alignment between our teams, and I would welcome the opportunity to explore this further. I am available for a coffee chat next week at your convenience — perhaps Tuesday or Wednesday afternoon?

Looking forward to continuing our discussion.

Best regards,
Jordan
model_a_results.prompt_template:
You are a world-class professional email writer with 15 years of experience
in corporate communications. You craft emails that are clear, persuasive, and perfectly
tailored to the requested tone. Your emails always have a compelling subject line and
well-structured body that achieves the stated intent.

Before writing the email, think through these steps:
1. UNDERSTAND the intent: What is the primary goal of this email?
2. ORGANIZE the facts: Which key facts are most relevant and in what order?
3. MATCH the tone: How should the language, sentence structure, and word choice reflect the requested tone?
4. CRAFT the subject: What subject line will grab attention and reflect the email's purpose?
5. WRITE the body: Compose a well-structured email that flows naturally and achieves the intent.

Output ONLY the final email with Subject and Body. No explanations.


EXAMPLE 1 — Formal:
Intent: Request budget approval for Q3 marketing campaign
Key Facts: Campaign budget is $50,000, Expected ROI is 3x, Targets 10,000 new leads
Tone: Formal

Subject: Budget Approval Request — Q3 Marketing Campaign
Body: Dear [Recipient],

I am writing to request your approval for the Q3 marketing campaign budget allocation.

The proposed campaign requires an investment of $50,000, with a projected return on investment of 3x within the quarter. Our analysis indicates this initiative will generate approximately 10,000 new qualified leads, significantly expanding our customer pipeline.

I have attached the detailed campaign plan and financial projections for your review. I am available to discuss this further at your earliest convenience.

Thank you for your consideration.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

---

EXAMPLE 2 — Casual:
Intent: Invite colleague to team lunch
Key Facts: New Italian restaurant downtown, Friday at noon, celebrating project completion
Tone: Casual

Subject: Team lunch this Friday?
Body: Hey!

Just wanted to check — there's a new Italian place downtown that looks amazing. Want to grab lunch there this Friday around noon? We've been crushing it on the project lately and it'd be great to celebrate.

Let me know if you're in!

Cheers,
[Your Name]

---

EXAMPLE 3 — Urgent:
Intent: Notify team of critical production issue
Key Facts: Payment service is down, affecting 30% of transactions, need all hands on deck
Tone: Urgent

Subject: URGENT: Payment Service Outage — Immediate Action Required
Body: Team,

We are currently experiencing a critical outage in our payment service that is impacting approximately 30% of all transactions. This requires immediate attention from all available engineers.

Please join the incident bridge call at once and prioritize this issue above all other tasks. I will provide updates every 15 minutes until resolution.

This is our top priority.

[Your Name]

---

EXAMPLE 4 — Empathetic:
Intent: Respond to customer complaint about delayed shipment
Key Facts: Order was delayed by 2 weeks, refund processing, improved logistics in place
Tone: Empathetic

Subject: We're Sorry — Your Order Update
Body: Dear [Customer],

I completely understand your frustration with the delay in receiving your order. Waiting two weeks beyond the promised delivery date is unacceptable, and I sincerely apologize for the inconvenience this has caused you.

Your refund has been processed and you should see it reflected in your account within 3-5 business days. Additionally, we have implemented improved logistics measures to prevent similar delays in the future.

Your experience matters deeply to us.

With sincere apologies,
[Your Name]


---

NOW WRITE THIS EMAIL:
Intent: Follow up after a networking event
Key Facts:
- Met at Tech Conference 2026
- Discussed potential collaboration on AI project
- Available for coffee chat next week
Tone: professional

Email:

fact_recall.details:
Recalled 3/3 facts.
  'Met at Tech Conference 2026' -> FOUND (67%)
  'Discussed potential collaboration on AI project' -> FOUND (75%)
  'Available for coffee chat next week' -> FOUND (83%)

clarity_conciseness.details:
Readability: 19.0 words/sentence -> 1.00
Length: 133 words -> 1.00
Redundancy: 0 repeated phrases -> 1.00
Subject: 9 words -> 1.00

model_a_results.intent: Request budget approval for Q3 marketing campaign
model_a_results.generated_subject: Budget Approval Request — Q3 Marketing Campaign
model_a_results.generated_body:
Dear [Recipient],

I am writing to seek your approval for the budget allocation required for our Q3 marketing campaign.

The initiative calls for a total investment of $50,000. Based on our projections, the campaign is expected to generate a return on investment of 3 × within the quarter and to capture approximately 10,000 new qualified leads, thereby strengthening our sales pipeline considerably.

Attached you will find the detailed campaign plan, financial model, and ROI analysis for your review. I would be happy to discuss any aspect of the proposal at your convenience.

Thank you for considering this request. I look forward to your favorable response.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Your Contact Information]
model_a_results.reference_subject: Q3 Marketing Campaign — Budget Approval Request
model_a_results.reference_body:
Dear Ms. Chen,

I am writing to formally request your approval for the Q3 marketing campaign budget allocation.

The proposed campaign requires an investment of $50,000. Based on our market analysis and historical performance data, we project a return on investment of 3x within the quarter. This initiative is expected to generate approximately 10,000 new qualified leads.

I have attached the detailed campaign plan and financial projections for your review.

Thank you for your consideration.

Sincerely,
Marketing Department

model_a_results.intent: Notify team of critical production issue
model_a_results.generated_subject: URGENT: Payment Service Outage — Immediate Action Required
model_a_results.generated_body:
Team,

Our payment service is currently down, impacting roughly 30% of all transactions. This is a critical production issue that requires every available engineer to engage immediately.

**Action required now:**
1. Join the incident bridge on Zoom at **[link]** – do not wait.
2. Prioritize this outage above all other work.
3. Begin troubleshooting the payment gateway and database connectivity as outlined in the run‑book (attached).
4. Post hourly updates in the #incident channel.

The situation will remain our top priority until full restoration. Do not hesitate to reach out to the incident commander, **[Name]**, for any blockers.

[Your Name]
[Title]
[Contact Information]

model_a_results.intent: Respond to customer complaint about delayed shipment
key_facts: Improved logistics measures are in place
model_a_results.generated_subject: Our Apologies — Update on Your Order
model_a_results.generated_body:
Dear [Customer Name],

I’m truly sorry for the inconvenience you’ve experienced with the recent delay of your order. I understand how disappointing it is to wait two weeks beyond the expected delivery date, and I appreciate your patience.

Please know that we have already processed a full refund for your purchase, which should appear in your account within 3–5 business days. In addition, we have put new logistics measures in place to ensure faster and more reliable deliveries moving forward.

Your satisfaction is incredibly important to us, and we are committed to making this right. If there’s anything else I can do for you, or if you have any further questions, please don’t hesitate to reach out.

With sincere apologies,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Company Name]
[Contact Information]
model_a_results.reference_subject: We're Sorry — Your Order Update and Refund
model_a_results.reference_body:
Dear Sarah,

I completely understand your frustration with the delay in receiving your order. Waiting two weeks beyond the promised delivery date is unacceptable, and I sincerely apologize for the inconvenience this has caused you.

Your full refund has been processed and you should see it reflected in your account within 3-5 business days. Additionally, we have implemented improved logistics measures to prevent similar delays in the future.

Your experience matters deeply to us.

With sincere apologies,
Customer Support Team

model_a_results.intent: Propose a new remote work policy
key_facts: Productivity increased 15% during remote work trial
Office costs could be reduced by 30% with hybrid model
model_a_results.generated_subject: Proposal: Implement a New Remote Work Policy – Boosting Productivity & Reducing Costs
model_a_results.generated_body:
Dear [Recipient Name],

I am writing to propose the adoption of a structured remote‑work policy based on the compelling results of our recent pilot program.

**Key outcomes from the trial**
- **Productivity:** Average output rose by 15% compared with pre‑remote baseline.
- **Employee satisfaction:** Scores improved by 20%, indicating higher engagement and morale.
- **Cost efficiency:** Transitioning to a hybrid model could lower our office‑related expenses by approximately 30% (leasing, utilities, and facilities management).

These metrics demonstrate that a flexible work arrangement not only enhances performance but also delivers significant financial benefits. I recommend formalizing a hybrid remote‑work policy that:
1. Allows eligible employees to work remotely up to three days per week.
2. Defines clear performance expectations and communication protocols.
3. Provides technology and security resources to support seamless collaboration.

I have attached a detailed policy draft, a cost‑benefit analysis, and an implementation timeline for your review. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss this proposal at your earliest convenience and to address any questions you may have.

Thank you for considering this strategic initiative.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Your Contact Information]
model_a_results.reference_body:
Dear Leadership Team,

I am writing to propose the adoption of a hybrid remote work policy based on the results of our recent trial period.

During the remote work trial, we observed a 15% increase in overall productivity and a 20% improvement in employee satisfaction scores. Additionally, transitioning to a hybrid model would allow us to reduce office-related costs by approximately 30%.

I recommend a structured approach: three days remote, two days in-office.

Best regards,
HR Director

key_facts: First week sales exceeded targets by 40%
Customer feedback has been overwhelmingly positive
model_a_results.generated_subject: 🎉 We Did It! Outstanding Launch Success 🎉
model_a_results.generated_body:
Dear Team,

I’m thrilled to announce that our product launch not only hit the schedule — it smashed it! In just the first week we exceeded our sales target by a whopping 40%, and the customer feedback has been nothing short of spectacular.

Your dedication, creativity, and unstoppable energy made this achievement possible. Every late‑night brainstorm, every meticulous test, and every enthusiastic shout‑out on the floor has paid off in a big way.

Let’s keep this momentum soaring as we move to the next phase. Celebrate this win, share the pride, and get ready for even more amazing milestones together!

Thank you for being extraordinary.

Onward and upward,

[Your Name]
model_a_results.reference_subject: Incredible Launch — You All Made It Happen!
model_a_results.reference_body:
Hi Team,

I wanted to take a moment to congratulate each and every one of you on an absolutely phenomenal product launch!

We hit our launch date on schedule, and the results speak for themselves: first week sales have exceeded our targets by an impressive 40%. The customer feedback we've received has been overwhelmingly positive.

This achievement is a testament to your hard work and dedication.

With gratitude,
Product Lead

model_a_results.intent: Request meeting to discuss partnership opportunity
key_facts: Potential partnership between TechCo and InnovateLab
Synergies in AI and machine learning capabilities
model_a_results.generated_subject: Request for Meeting – Potential TechCo & InnovateLab Partnership
model_a_results.generated_body:
Dear [Recipient Name],

I hope this message finds you well. I am reaching out to propose a meeting to discuss a prospective partnership between TechCo and InnovateLab. Both organizations possess complementary strengths in artificial intelligence and machine learning, creating a compelling opportunity to combine our respective expertise.

We have identified several strategic synergies that could accelerate product development, expand market reach, and drive mutual growth. To align our efforts, we are targeting a collaborative rollout in Q4 2026.

Could we schedule a discussion at your earliest convenience to review the partnership framework and outline next steps? I am available next week on Tuesday (June 23) and Thursday (June 25) between 10:00 a.m. and 2:00 p.m., but I am happy to accommodate an alternative time that better fits your schedule.

Thank you for considering this opportunity. I look forward to the prospect of working together.

Sincerely,

[Your Full Name]
[Your Title]
TechCo
[Phone Number]
[Email Address]
model_a_results.reference_body:
Dear Dr. Williams,

I hope this letter finds you well. I am writing on behalf of TechCo to explore a potential partnership with InnovateLab.

Our analysis has identified significant synergies between our respective AI and machine learning capabilities. We are targeting Q4 2026 for any formalized arrangement.

Would you be available for an introductory call during the week of June 23rd?

Kind regards,
VP of Business Development
TechCo

model_a_results.intent: Apologize for a service outage affecting customers
key_facts: Root cause was a failed migration script
Monitoring and safeguards have been improved
model_a_results.generated_subject: We’re Sorry — Update on Yesterday’s Service Outage
model_a_results.generated_body:
Dear Valued Customer,

I want to extend our sincere apologies for the disruption you experienced yesterday when our database was unavailable for four hours. We understand how frustrating it is to be unable to access the service you rely on, and we deeply regret any inconvenience this caused.

Our investigation revealed that the outage was triggered by a failed migration script during a routine update. While the script was intended to improve performance, it unintentionally caused the database to become inaccessible.

Please rest assured that we have taken immediate corrective actions. We have strengthened our monitoring systems and added additional safeguards to detect and halt any similar issues before they impact you. These enhancements are designed to prevent a recurrence and to restore confidence in the reliability of our service.

Your experience matters to us, and we are committed to learning from this incident to serve you better. If you have any questions or need further assistance, please do not hesitate to reach out to our support team at support@example.com or call 1‑800‑555‑0199.

Thank you for your understanding and continued trust.

With sincere apologies,
[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Company Name]
model_a_results.reference_body:
Dear Valued Customer,

I am writing to personally apologize for the service disruption you experienced yesterday. Our database was unavailable for approximately four hours, and I understand how frustrating this was for you.

The root cause was a failed migration script. We have implemented enhanced monitoring systems and additional safeguards to prevent this from happening again.

We value your trust in our platform.

With sincere apologies,
CTO

Hi [Name],

It was great meeting you at Tech Conference 2026. I really enjoyed our conversation about [specific topic discussed], and I appreciate you sharing your insights on [any particular point they made].

As I mentioned, I'm very interested in exploring the possibility of collaborating on [AI project/initiative]. I think there could be some valuable synergies between our work, and I'd love to discuss how we might move forward together.

Would you be available for a coffee chat sometime next week? I'm happy to work around your schedule and can meet at a location that's convenient for you. Please let me know what day and time work best, and I'll make the arrangements.

In the meantime, feel free to connect with me on [LinkedIn/other platform] if you haven't already, and don't hesitate to reach out if you have any preliminary thoughts on the collaboration.

Looking forward to staying in touch and hopefully meeting up soon.

Best regards,

model_b_results.intent: Notify team of critical production issue
model_b_results.generated_subject: 🚨 CRITICAL: Payment Service Down – Immediate Action Required
model_b_results.generated_body:
Team,

We have a P0 production incident. The payment service is currently DOWN, and approximately 30% of transactions are failing. This requires immediate attention from all hands on deck.

**Impact:**
- Payment service offline
- 30% of transactions affected
- Revenue and customer trust at immediate risk

**What we need from you RIGHT NOW:**
1. Drop everything else and join the #incident channel immediately.
2. Engineering: Begin triage and root cause analysis NOW. No standups, no meetings – incident only until resolved.
3. Ops/Support: Pull the latest error logs and prepare customer-facing comms.
4. Leadership: Awaiting updates every 15 minutes in the incident bridge.

Every minute this continues is revenue lost and customers lost. This is an all-hands, no-excuses situation. We treat this as a SEV-1 until the service is fully restored.

If you have not yet checked in, do so NOW.

Let's move. Fast.

— [Your Name]

Engineering Lead

model_b_results.intent: Respond to customer complaint about delayed shipment
key_facts: Improved logistics measures are in place
model_b_results.generated_subject: Regarding Your Delayed Shipment - Our Apologies and Resolution
model_b_results.generated_body:
Dear [Customer Name],

Thank you for reaching out to us about the delay with your recent order. I want to sincerely apologize for the experience you've had. I understand how frustrating it must be to wait longer than expected, and I truly regret the inconvenience this has caused you.

After reviewing your order, I can confirm that it was unfortunately delayed by approximately two weeks. I want to assure you that this is not the standard of service we strive to provide, and we take full responsibility for the delay.

Here is what we are doing to make things right:

1. **Full Refund:** A full refund for your order is currently being processed. You should see the credit reflected in your account within 5-7 business days, depending on your payment provider.

2. **Improved Logistics:** We have already implemented enhanced logistics measures to prevent similar delays from occurring in the future. This includes strengthened tracking systems, improved coordination with our shipping partners, and additional quality checks throughout the fulfillment process.

We value your trust in us, and we are committed to providing you with the reliable and timely service you deserve. Your feedback has been shared with our logistics team to help ensure continuous improvement.

If you have any further questions or concerns, please don't hesitate to reach out. I'm here to help in any way I can.

Once again, please accept our heartfelt apologies for the inconvenience. We hope to have the opportunity to serve you better in the future.

Warm regards,

[Your Name]
Customer Support Team
[Company Name]
model_b_results.reference_subject: We're Sorry — Your Order Update and Refund
model_b_results.reference_body:
Dear Sarah,

I completely understand your frustration with the delay in receiving your order. Waiting two weeks beyond the promised delivery date is unacceptable, and I sincerely apologize for the inconvenience this has caused you.

Your full refund has been processed and you should see it reflected in your account within 3-5 business days. Additionally, we have implemented improved logistics measures to prevent similar delays in the future.

Your experience matters deeply to us.

With sincere apologies,
Customer Support Team

Office costs could be reduced by 30% with hybrid model
model_b_results.generated_subject: Proposal: Adoption of a Hybrid Remote Work Policy
model_b_results.generated_body:
Dear Team,

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to share the results of our recent remote work trial and to propose the formal adoption of a hybrid remote work policy.

Over the course of the trial period, we observed the following outcomes:

- **Productivity:** Increased by 15%
- **Employee Satisfaction:** Improved by 20%
- **Operational Costs:** Potential reduction of up to 30% with a hybrid model

These results suggest that a structured hybrid approach could benefit both our team and the organization as a whole. The proposed policy would offer employees greater flexibility while maintaining operational efficiency and collaboration standards.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss this proposal further and to gather your input on the structure and implementation of the policy. Please let me know a convenient time to meet, or feel free to share your thoughts via email.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Position]

During the remote work trial, we observed a 15% increase in overall productivity and a 20% improvement in employee satisfaction scores. Additionally, transitioning to a hybrid model would allow us to reduce office-related costs by approximately 30%.

I recommend a structured approach: three days remote, two days in-office.

Best regards,
HR Director

model_b_results.intent: Congratulate team on successful product launch
key_facts: First week sales exceeded targets by 40%
Customer feedback has been overwhelmingly positive
model_b_results.generated_subject: 🎉 We Did It! Congratulations on a Phenomenal Product Launch!
model_b_results.generated_body:
Hi Team,

I am absolutely thrilled to congratulate each and every one of you on the incredible success of our product launch! What we accomplished together is nothing short of outstanding, and I could not be prouder to be part of this amazing team.

Not only did we launch the product right on schedule—a testament to your dedication, collaboration, and meticulous planning—but we also blew past our first-week sales targets by a remarkable 40%! That is an extraordinary achievement that speaks volumes about the quality of the product and the hard work everyone put in to bring it to life.

And the best part? The customer feedback has been overwhelmingly positive. Hearing our users rave about the product is the most rewarding validation of the effort, creativity, and countless hours you all invested. You have built something that people truly love, and that is the highest compliment we could ask for.

This launch is a shining example of what we can accomplish when we come together with a shared vision and unwavering commitment. Thank you for your passion, your late nights, your problem-solving, and your teamwork. You should all feel incredibly proud of what you have achieved—because you have earned every bit of this success.

Let us take a moment to celebrate this milestone, and then let us carry this incredible momentum forward. The future looks brighter than ever!

Once again, congratulations, and thank you for making this launch one for the books! 🚀

With gratitude and excitement,
[Your Name]
model_b_results.reference_subject: Incredible Launch — You All Made It Happen!
model_b_results.reference_body:
Hi Team,

I wanted to take a moment to congratulate each and every one of you on an absolutely phenomenal product launch!

We hit our launch date on schedule, and the results speak for themselves: first week sales have exceeded our targets by an impressive 40%. The customer feedback we've received has been overwhelmingly positive.

This achievement is a testament to your hard work and dedication.

With gratitude,
Product Lead

model_b_results.generated_subject: Request for Meeting to Discuss Potential Partnership Opportunity
model_b_results.generated_body:
Dear [Recipient Name],

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to request a meeting at your earliest convenience to discuss a potential partnership between TechCo and InnovateLab.

Having reviewed the respective capabilities of both organizations, I believe there are considerable synergies to be explored, particularly in the areas of artificial intelligence and machine learning. A collaborative engagement between our teams could yield mutually beneficial outcomes and strengthen our positions within these rapidly evolving fields.

Our objective is to initiate discussions with the aim of finalizing terms within the fourth quarter of 2026. To that end, I would appreciate the opportunity to meet with you or a member of your leadership team to further explore the scope of this partnership.

Please let me know your availability over the coming weeks, and I will be glad to accommodate a time that is convenient for you. Should you wish to suggest a preferred format for the meeting—whether in person or via video conference—I am happy to proceed accordingly.

Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to your response.

Kind regards,
[Your Full Name]
[Your Title]
[Your Company]
[Contact Information]

Kind regards,
VP of Business Development
